title: Naming Files Well
drDigitalIntro: File names matter — a good name tells you what's inside. Compare: IMG_48293 tells you nothing, but Vacation_Hawaii_2026 tells you exactly what it is. Use descriptive names with spaces or underscores. Avoid special characters like * or / — they confuse your Mac. Include a date if it helps you find things later: Invoice_2026_July. Good names save you time when you're searching for files later.
drDigitalSuccess: You'll save yourself headaches by naming files clearly!
drDigitalHint: Future you will be grateful for a clear, descriptive file name.
